creator: ehaupt@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Tatsuki Makino from comment #1)

> 270000🤣

Congratulations! \o/

> When a message box is displayed in a MilkyTracker window, the window contents are not redrawn.
> The contents of a window disappear when another window is stacked on top of it.
> If the Save current changes? message box is lost, MilkyTracker cannot be terminated peacefully.

Can you show me how I can reproduce this?

I tried:

- Load a song
- Play
- Press "Load" button

=> Song keeps playing, background is updating:
https://critical.ch/people/28ab064f-bcec-11ed-b56b-10bf48e1088e/Screenshot_2023-03-07_14-29-27.png
